name: Good first issue

labels: good-first-issue, help-wanted

---

## Overview
Brief description of what needs to be done.

## Current Behavior
How it works now.

## Desired Behavior
How it should work after this change.

## Implementation Hints
Suggestions for how to approach this:
- Which files to look at
- What functions to modify
- Any gotchas to watch out for

## Acceptance Criteria
What does "done" look like?
- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Examples added (if applicable)

## Skills Needed
- Bash scripting
- Git knowledge
- (Add specific skills if needed)

## Questions?
Feel free to ask questions in the comments! We're happy to help guide you through your first contribution.
